evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service
Currently served by B44 bus route

proposed_relations.description: B44 SBS and B44 Local are complementary service variants on the same Nostrand/Rogers Avenues corridor, discussed together in the same CB9 presentation

evidence_refs.source_quote: Northbound B44 SBS on Rogers Ave, B44 local remains on New York Ave

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_b44-sbs; alias route_b44-sbs-20110927-presentation is listed in that registry card and source 201109_nostrand_cb9_slides appears in its source_ids. Service variant 'sbs' matches payload route_type 'select_bus_service'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Northbound B44 SBS on Rogers Ave, B44 local remains on New York Ave

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_b44-local; alias route_b44-local-20110927-presentation is listed in that registry card and source 201109_nostrand_cb9_slides appears in its source_ids. Service variant 'local' matches payload route_type 'local_bus'. do_not_merge_pairs confirms route_b44-local and route_b44-sbs are distinct variants.
